_meta.methodology: GCSE results from DfE national statistics. PISA rankings from OECD Programme for International Student Assessment, conducted every 3 years.

gcse_english_maths.label: GCSE grade 4+ in English & Maths
gcse_english_maths.note: Grade 4 is a 'standard pass'. Required for most further education and many jobs.

pisa_maths_rank.label: PISA maths ranking
pisa_maths_rank.note: UK ranked 11th globally for maths in the OECD PISA 2022 assessment. Singapore ranked 1st.

ofsted_good_outstanding.label: Schools rated Good or Outstanding
ofsted_good_outstanding.note: Percentage of state-funded schools in England rated Good or Outstanding by Ofsted.
